# Sergey Emelyanov — Senior Software Engineer (PHP/Go)
> 14+ years of backend development. Rambler&Co, ex-Avito, ex-Lamoda, ex-MTS Fintech.
> Stack: PHP 8, Go, Symfony, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Kafka, Kubernetes.
> Research: Agentic AI in Enterprise (ICAIMT 2026). Product: ResumeCraft SaaS.
> Education: HSE University (Product Management), Kuban State University (Psychology).

## Experience
- Rambler&Co (2024-present) — Senior Software Engineer PHP/Go, high-load services, microservices
- Lamoda Tech (2022-2024) — PHP Developer, e-commerce platform, PHP 7->8 migration
- Rambler&Co (2021-2022) — Senior PHP Developer, reporting subsystem, ad bid management
- MTS Fintech (2020-2021) — Senior PHP Developer, config microservice from scratch, Laravel+Orchid
- ETP Gazprombank (2016-2020) — Senior PHP Developer, government procurement integration
- Avito (2016) — PHP Developer, billing microservice, payment integrations
- Mamba/Tourbar (2015-2016) — PHP Developer, social API integrations, real-time features
- Sutochno.ru (2011-2015) — Senior PHP Developer, prototype to production, payment systems

## Projects
- ResumeCraft (resumecraft.ru) — Multi-agent resume optimizer, 5 LLM providers
- ICAIMT 2026 Paper — EAAMM maturity model, 136 respondents survey
- Career-Ops — AI job search system adapted for Russian market
- Avito Travel Product Analysis — PAM/TAM/SAM/SOM, PESTLE, competitive benchmarking

## Skills
- Backend: PHP 8, Go, Symfony, Laravel, Phalcon
- Data: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch
- Infrastructure: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Nginx
- AI/ML: Python, FastAPI, LLM integration (Claude API, OpenAI API)
- Product: Unit Economics, A/B testing, JTBD, CJM
- Architecture: ArchiMate 3.2, Microservices, Event-Driven, DDD
